I Ching Divination

Ask the ancient oracle for guidance — love, career, investment, life

💼 Tools for Entrepreneurs

Running a business? Check out the AI Side Hustle Blueprint — 50+ pages of practical guides for building passive income with AI.

View on Ko-fi →
🙏 This tool is completely free. If it helped you, please support the creator! 💛 Support

✨ How It Works

1

Type your question (e.g., "Should I invest in crypto now?" or "Is this the right time to change jobs?")

2

Pick a hexagram that resonates with you, or let the AI choose one for you

3

Click "Consult the Oracle" and receive your I Ching reading with ancient wisdom + modern interpretation

🔮 Your Question

☰Qian (Creative)
☷Kun (Receptive)
䷊Tai (Peace)
☵Kan (Abyss)
☴Xun (Wind)
☲Li (Fire)
☶Gen (Mountain)
䷫Sui (Following)
